texto: Do you know the difference between education and experience? Education is when you read the fine print
autor: experience is what you get when you don't.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de experience is what you get when you don't. que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “Do you know the difference between education and experience? Education is when you read the fine …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, pete-seeger, reflexao, com foco em reflexao.
